title: Brand logo thread stays local
description: Brand/logo review should stay in the current brief and avoid dragging in unrelated health or memory-system residue.
query: Business logo direction, typography, and current brief review.

nodes.value: Logo review work should stay close to the current brand brief and typography choices.
For logo reviews, keep feedback concrete around the current brief instead of drifting into unrelated background.
When reviewing a logo, compare typography and symbol direction directly against the brief.
Wellbeing check-ins should stay centered on sleep, energy, and recovery.
A memory system should be inspectable open-source infrastructure with explicit judgment.
Broad profile note: prefers biography framing and global admin summaries across projects.
